summary: Connected extractDocument to Wave 8 mapping engine. The endpoint now returns full semantic extraction including field types, ACORD candidates, bounding boxes, page dimensions, structural delta metadata, and confidence scores.

changes.description: Connected to Wave 8 mapping engine (mapBlocksWithAcord). All code paths (file upload, JSON blocks, plain text) now call enrichWithMappingEngine() which runs inferSemanticFields() + mapBlocksWithAcord().
changes.before: Returned raw OCR blocks or mock data without ACORD enrichment
changes.after: Returns full semantic extraction: blocks, mappings (FieldMapping[]), fieldTypes, pageDimensions, structuralDelta, enriched summary
functions_added: scaleBoundingBoxToPixels(bbox, unit) — converts Document Intelligence inch coords to canvas pixels (96 DPI)
buildBlocksFromPages(pages) — converts PageExtraction lines to typed ExtractedBlock[] with checkbox/signature/kvp detection
generateMockBlocks() — 30-block realistic ACORD 125 form mock replacing the 4-block simplified mock
enrichWithMappingEngine(blocks, documentId, context) — runs inferSemanticFields + mapBlocksWithAcord, graceful fallback on error

changes.description: Fixed binding panel ACORD candidate click handler. Was calling non-existent updateMapping(), now correctly calls chooseCandidate(extractionBlockId, acordCode) from mappingStore.
changes.after: chooseCandidate(extractionBlockId, candidate.acordCode) — correctly updates mapping store

pipeline_flow.step2: Document Intelligence extraction (or mock) → normalized PageExtraction[]
pipeline_flow.step3: buildBlocksFromPages() → typed ExtractedBlock[] with DPI-scaled bboxes
pipeline_flow.step5: mapBlocksWithAcord() → FieldMapping[] with ranked ACORD candidates + confidence scores
pipeline_flow.step6: Response includes all artifacts: pages, blocks, mappings, fieldTypes, pageDimensions, structuralDelta
pipeline_flow.step7: Frontend PdfImportModal calls initializeMappings() → mappingStore populated
pipeline_flow.step8: DesignerBindingsPanel shows candidates; user clicks → chooseCandidate() persists choice

wave8_integration.graceful_degradation: If mapping engine throws, stubs FieldMapping[] without candidates and logs warning
